title: Ennai Saaithaale Lyrics Endrendrum Punnagai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ennai Saaithaalae
Singer(s): Hariharan, Shreya Ghoshal
Movie: Endrendrum Punnagai
Music: Harris Jayaraj
Lyrics: Thamarai

Ennai saaithaaley, uyir theyithaale
ini vazhveno inidhaaga
thadumaaraamal, tharai modhaamal
ini veelveno muludhaaga

idhal aalathil punnagai poothaale
en paavangal theerthaen
oh mazhai eerathil nanayaamal naan
veliyerathaan paarthaen

nadakira varai, nagargira tharai
adhanmel thavikiren
vizhigalin pirai vilugira thirai
athanaal thigaikiren

Netru pole vaanam, ada indru kooda neelam
en naatkal thaandidum
thalli poga ennum, kaal pakkam vandha pinnum
ketkaadhey yaar sollum.

paravai naaan siragu nee
naan kaatrai vella aasai kondaen
payanam nan valigal nee
naa ellai thaandi sella kandaen

Ennai saaithaaley, uyir theyithaale
ini vazhveno inidhaaga
thadumaaraamal, tharai modhaamal
ini veelveno muludhaaga

Malai vandhaal podhum
oru nootru pathil vegam
senthaangal polae kaayum

kaatru vandhu modhum
un kaigal endru thondrum
pin yemaatram theendum

thavipadhai maraikiren
en poiyai pooti vaithu kondaen
kanavile vizhikiren,
en kayil saami ondrai kandaen

Ennai saaithaaley, uyir theyithaale
ini vazhveno inidhaaga
thadumaaraamal, tharai modhaamal
ini veelveno muludhaaga

idhal aalathil punnagai poothaale
en paavangal theerthaen
oh mazhai eerathil nanayaamal naan
veliyerathaan paarthaai

nadakira varai, nagargira tharai
adhanmel thavikiren
vizhigalin pirai vilugira thirai
athanaal thigaikiren

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ennai Saaithaale?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, expressing how love transforms life.

What is the plot context of the song in Endrendrum Punnagai?

This song captures a romantic moment between the lead characters, highlighting their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal.

Who composed the music for Ennai Saaithaale?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 25, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Ennai Saaithaale is a romantic duet that encapsulates the essence of love and emotional connection between the protagonists in Endrendrum Punnagai. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics by Thamarai evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The collaboration between Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal adds a unique charm to the song, enhancing its emotional depth. This track beautifully conveys the transformative power of love, resonating with anyone who has experienced such feelings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Ennai Saaithaale, a mesmerizing duet that beautifully blends the soulful voices of Hariharan and Shreya Ghoshal. This captivating track from the movie Endrendrum Punnagai showcases a perfect harmony of romance and soothing melodies, crafted by the talented music director Harrish Jeyaraj. Let the heartfelt lyrics by Thamarai take you on an emotional journey that resonates with love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: If you embrace me, will I live? From now on, without any hindrance, will I rise without falling?
In this moment, a smile blooms, my sins are washed away. Oh, in the rain, without getting wet, I have seen the outside world.
Until the end of the journey, I will rest on the earth that is moving. The moonlight of my eyes shines on the screen, and because of that, I feel alive.
Like yesterday's sky, today the earth will also throw away my past days. Even when the time comes, don't ask who will say anything.
I am a bird, you are the wings. I have a desire to conquer the wind. My journey is to cross all boundaries and reach the destination.
If you embrace me, will I live? From now on, without any hindrance, will I rise without falling?
When the evening comes, a hundred answers will come quickly like a flame.
The wind comes and touches your hands, and then it only seeks me.
I forget my mistakes and hide my lies. I have seen in my dreams, I have found God in my hands.
If you embrace me, will I live? From now on, without any hindrance, will I rise without falling?
In this moment, a smile blooms, my sins are washed away. Oh, in the rain, without getting wet, I have seen the outside world.
Until the end of the journey, I will rest on the earth that is moving. The moonlight of my eyes shines on the screen, and because of that, I feel alive.
